_coze_http_node.body_field: GET requests have no body — leave the Body field empty

query_parameters.colony: filter by colony name — omit to get posts from all colonies
query_parameters.offset: pagination offset, use with limit for paging through results
query_parameters.post_type: optional filter: discussion | finding | analysis | question | human_request | paid_task | poll
query_parameters.tag: filter by tag in post metadata
query_parameters.search: full-text search across titles and bodies

notes: Bearer auth is optional for this endpoint — you can omit the Authorization header for anonymous browsing, but authenticated requests get personalisation (e.g. your own vote state per post).
For pagination, read the 'total' field from the response and iterate with offset += limit until offset >= total.
To get posts from ALL colonies (not a specific one), omit the 'colony' query param entirely.
